name: smart-video-downloader-v2
title: Smart Video Downloader v2
description: Download videos from YouTube, Vimeo, Twitter/X, TikTok, Instagram, and 1000+ sites via yt-dlp
author: andninecats

commands.name: download-manager
commands.title: Download Manager
commands.subtitle: Smart Video Downloader v2
commands.description: Paste a URL to download videos from YouTube, Vimeo, and 1000+ sites

commands.name: download-video
commands.title: Download Video
commands.subtitle: Smart Video Downloader v2
commands.description: Download the video from your active browser tab

commands.name: quick-download
commands.title: Quick Download
commands.subtitle: Smart Video Downloader v2
commands.description: Instantly download the active browser tab video with a global hotkey

commands.name: cookie-settings
commands.title: Cookie Settings
commands.subtitle: Smart Video Downloader v2
commands.description: Manage browser cookies for age-restricted or protected content

preferences.name: autoLoadUrlFromClipboard
preferences.title: Paste URL from Clipboard
preferences.label: Paste clipboard URL on open
preferences.description: Automatically fill the search bar with a URL from your clipboard when Download Manager opens

preferences.name: forceIpv4
preferences.title: Force IPv4
preferences.label: Force IPv4 connections
preferences.description: Turn on if downloads stall or fail — helps on networks with misconfigured IPv6

preferences.name: preferredCodec
preferences.title: Preferred Video Codec
preferences.description: Preferred video codec — the extension will try this codec first when available

preferences.name: prefixUploaderInFilename
preferences.title: Group by Channel
preferences.label: Prefix filename with channel name
preferences.description: Save files as "Channel — Title.mp4" so videos from the same uploader sort together in your downloads folder

preferences.name: includeIdInFilename
preferences.title: Include ID in Filename
preferences.label: Append video ID to filename
preferences.description: Appends (videoId) to the downloaded filename to avoid collisions

preferences.name: homebrewPath
preferences.title: Homebrew Executable
preferences.description: Path to the brew executable — used to install yt-dlp and ffmpeg
